response: A senior recruiter in the pharmaceutical industry, specifically focused on production and supply chain roles in France, is responsible for identifying and attracting qualified professionals who work in areas such as manufacturing, logistics, quality control, and supply chain management. This role involves sourcing candidates, conducting interviews, and ensuring that the right talent is selected for positions that support the operational and strategic goals of pharmaceutical companies operating in France. The recruiter may also work closely with internal teams to align recruitment efforts with organizational needs and industry trends.
